item.title: Trump expected to endorse Cornyn in brutal Texas Senate runoff
item.description: President Trump is expected to endorse Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Senate race , a source with knowledge of the talks tells Axios. Why it matters: T...

item.title: Americans aren't sold on Iran attacks, new polls show
item.description: Some five days into the sprawling Middle East conflict sparked by U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran, significantly more Americans disapprove than approve o...

item.title: James Talarico wins Democratic primary in Texas' U.S. Senate race
item.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico of Austin defeated U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett of Dallas for the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas. Why it...

item.title: The labor market is finally stabilizing, but there's a catch
item.description: New private sector data shows signs of life for a labor market that's stabilizing after a dismal year for hiring. Why it matters: It's a welcome devel...

item.title: Brutal Texas primary night points to trouble ahead for House incumbents
item.description: One House Republican lost his seat outright in Texas' primary elections Tuesday night, and four other House members will face grueling, 12-week runoff...
